data.body: Landed (commit 8d96d658). Re-scoped per code investigation: overlays adopt the EXISTING if: skip-guard (no new IR field); the new piece is the deterministic overlay_triggers precompute step (9th built-in) computing keyword + structural trigger booleans an if: references, keeping the closed expression grammar untouched. Advisories addressed: E5 (trigger logic tested directly), G6 (committed: inclusion observable via the step's journaled trigger outputs + per-step durable skip status — no new run-start event). Code-review subagent (general-purpose): verified deps-graph shape (has_linked_* works), lint accepts the open-output reference; strengthened the replay test to a genuine store-edit (changed rebar.deps mock) proving the RECORDED output drives the replay decision. Contract schemas registered (fixed the schema-coverage gate). make lint clean; 308 workflow + 48 contract/coverage/overlay tests green.
